reasoning: Koren, your lactate clearance is limiting sustained efforts. Your last ride showed a need to adapt to changes in intensity, crucial for the Alpine Loop climb. This workout specifically targets lactate clearance and builds aerobic base, essential for maintaining power over the 8.5-mile climb on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x (5 min at 242-256W, 5 min at 201-218W); focus on controlled breathing

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
